name: IRC_AF_VERSIONS
description: Base Table for Versions of Apply Flow.

columns.Name: AF_VERSION_ID
columns.Comments: Primary Key for this table. System generated.

columns.Name: APPLY_FLOW_ID
columns.Comments: ID of the corresponding Apply Flow. Foreign Key to IRC_APPLY_FLOWS_B.

columns.Name: VERSION_NAME
columns.Comments: Stores the name of the apply flow version.

columns.Name: VERSION_STATUS_CODE
columns.Comments: Indicates the status of the apply flow version based on lookup.  The corresponding lookup type is ORA_IRC_AF_VERSION_STATUS.

columns.Name: VERSION_START_DATE
columns.Comments: Stores the date time from which apply flow  version is valid.

columns.Name: LEGAL_ENABLED_FLAG
columns.Comments: Stores whether Legal Description is enabled for the Apply Flow Version.

columns.Name: ESIGN_ENABLED_FLAG
columns.Comments: Stores if the E-Signature is enabled for Apply Flow Version.

columns.Name: OPTIN_ENABLED_FLAG
columns.Comments: Stores if the Opt in is enabled for Apply Flow Version.

columns.Name: TC_OPTIN_ENABLED_FLAG
columns.Comments: Stores if the Opt in is enabled for Talent Community Apply Flow Version.

columns.Name: SINGLE_CLICK_APPLY_FLAG
columns.Comments: Stores whether Apply flow is Single click enabled for the Apply Flow Version.

columns.Name: QUICK_APPLY_ENABLED_FLAG
columns.Comments: Stores if the Quick Apply is enabled for Apply Flow Version.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
